topic.title: 1/17 Class: Guest Speaker Enrique Sallent (UX Accessibility, Fidelity) + Extra Credit
topic.text:
Hello everyone,

This Saturday, January 17, we’re excited to welcome our guest speaker:

Enrique Sallent
UX Accessibility Principal, Fidelity Investments

Enrique leads the Accessibility Experience program at Fidelity Investments (FI Group), where he crafts strategic roadmaps and initiatives to ensure Fidelity’s digital platforms are accessible to all. He works closely with product and Experience teams to set standards across websites, apps, design systems, and emerging digital innovations.

With 25+ years of experience as a UX professional, Enrique has designed complex systems, built and mentored design teams, and driven multidisciplinary collaboration. His current focus is on improving Fidelity’s Institutional ecosystem to better serve clients with disabilities—using data, KPIs, and measurable outcomes to guide decision-making.

This talk will focus on:

  • Why UX Accessibility is a business and career differentiator

  • How accessibility shows up in real product teams

  • What hiring managers actually look for when evaluating accessibility experience

Extra Credit Opportunity (10 Points)

We are offering 10 extra credit points for guest speaker participation this week.

Why this matters:
Technical skills get you interviews. Your network gets you hired.
Every guest speaker is a potential mentor, reference, or door-opener. Forbes Top 20 leaders don’t typically spend Saturdays with students—being invisible when they do is a career mistake.

The most successful alumni aren’t the ones with the highest GPAs—they’re the ones who built relationships.

How to Earn the 10 Points:

  • Camera on during the speaker session: 3 points

  • Ask at least one question: 3 points

  • Connect with Enrique on LinkedIn: 3 points

  • Send a short thank-you message: 1 point

(10 points per speaker, per week)

🔗 Zoom Information

Join Zoom Meeting
https://northeastern.zoom.us/j/92710545738?pwd=DoIn2w725fjrJWuXpDaKQTY1ndMEMl.1

Meeting ID: 927 1054 5738
Passcode: 881831

Come prepared, be engaged, and treat this like the professional opportunity it is.

See you Saturday,
Nina and Nik
